---
title: "Session 2: Origin-destination analysis"
pagetitle: "Session 2"
---

# Origin-destination data analysis

This session covers analysis of OD data for transport planning.

## Learning objectives

- Understand OD data structures
- Calculate desire lines
- Aggregate flows by zone
- Filter and summarise OD data

## Desire lines

```r
library(stplanr)
library(sf)

# Convert OD pairs to desire lines
zones = read_sf("zones.geojson")
od_data = read_csv("od_data.csv")

desire_lines = od2line(flow = od_data, zones = zones)
plot(desire_lines["all"])
```

## Aggregation

```r
# Aggregate flows by origin
flows_by_origin = od_data |>
  group_by(origin) |>
  summarise(total_flow = sum(all))
```
